articles.title: Home of the Week: 3BR in Sherborn offers open space in MetroWest for $799k
articles.description:
Sherborn is a proudly bucolic town about 25 miles from downtown Boston that boasts 50 percent of its land is set aside for open space.

The post Home of the Week: 3BR in Sherborn offers open space in MetroWest for $799k appeared first on Boston.com.
